for me, polytron is a big brand that has been known for quite a long time as a local electronics manufacturer in indonesia. however, it is very unsafe, i personally had a very bad experience yesterday, when i bought stb tv products at the polytron official store in tokopedia. my disappointment started when i realized that the product i ordered had not yet arrived at my home address. even though the payment process was successful and was confirmed by the seller from the previous day. then i immediately opened the order history in the application, and it turned out that i was surprised that my order status was still being processed by the seller/shop. i immediately asked the store about this problem through the seller chat feature on tokopedia. after a while, the polytron official store admin replied to my message. but it's a shame, the admin instead answered briefly, that the delivery process takes days. in fact, the time information is not available on the shop or product page. tomorrow, a few days later, i checked again, it turned out that the delivery of the goods was still not working, the statement said that the courier had canceled the pick-up for reasons from the seller (the next day the information was repeated several times), and finally the ordered product arrived at the house after a week. after that, i personally came to the conclusion that the shop/admin seemed to be deliberately stalling for time, possibly even though the stock was empty due to a flood of orders. aah.. anyway i'm disappointed with polytron's official store service at tokopedia!! btw, the product quality is very good, especially in terms of fashion and build quality materials. it's not bad so it cures my disappointment a little.
